# LogRateLimiter.ShouldEmit method

Returns `true` when a log notification may be emitted at *nowMs*, recording *nowMs* as the new last-emit time when permitted. Mirrors TS `shouldEmit`.

```csharp
public bool ShouldEmit(long nowMs)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| nowMs | The current time in milliseconds (injected at the call site). |

## Return Value

`true` when emission is permitted.
